meta.title: Navigating The S4x26 Welcome Party
meta.description: The S4x26 Welcome Party is at the Fillmore Miami Beach, the art deco theater where S4 was held from 2016 - 2022. This video will show you where everything is including the casino, karaoke bar, cigar patio, lego station, magician food trucks, bars (including a no alcohol bar), and more.
